creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

    lang/zig: unbreak fetch due distfile refresh after 8c1e3e605452

    fetch: https://ziglang.org/download/0.11.0/zig-0.11.0.tar.xz: size mismatch: expected 65092512, actual 15275316
